$comment: Routing + lifecycle index for the frontier research layer. Audited by tools/_audit_research.py (run from research/): every entry's path must exist on disk, and every on-disk note/experiment/report must have an entry here. Trust model: research claims are sourced + tiered + dated and they STALE; cite as research/notes/<file>.md, EXP-NN, or RR-NN — never as a Book NN §X.
staleness_policy: A note stales ~180 days after its 'reviewed:' date. Re-verify load-bearing claims (and bump the date) before planning against it. The audit warns on stale notes; --strict-staleness makes staleness a failure.
